market_brief.summary_en: Markets closed in a MIXED regime at 55.6 out of 100 with SPY at $746.77 up 0.78 percent and QQQ at $736.40 up 1.70 percent as distribution days hit DANGER levels.
key_themes_en: SPY distribution reached 7 days DANGER and QQQ reached 6 days DANGER
Bitcoin is at $58,630.89, down 2.51% today and 1.83% over five days
market_brief.watch_points_en: Watch SPY distribution at 7 days and QQQ at 6 days for continued risk signals.
market_brief.watch_points_ko: SPY 7일 QQQ 6일 분배일 DANGER 수준 주시

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $477.57 with post-market at $476.10. Price holds above EMA21 at $437.28 and EMA50 at $416.32 in confirmed uptrend with golden cross. Optimistic sentiment stems from analyst price target raises and AI demand strength.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 477.57달러에 마감했고 포스트마켓은 476.10달러이다. 주가는 EMA21 437.28달러와 EMA50 416.32달러 위에서 골든크로스와 함께 확정 상승 추세를 유지한다. 낙관적 심리는 애널리스트 목표가 상향과 AI 수요 강세에서 나온다.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: RSI bearish divergence near 52-week high of $479.01
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Entry near EMA21 $437.28 with breakout above $479.01

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $200.09 with post-market at $199.66. Price trades below EMA21 at $204.41 yet above EMA200 at $188.92 in monthly confirmed uptrend. Optimistic views highlight AI infrastructure dominance and long-term growth.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA는 200.09달러에 마감했고 포스트마켓은 199.66달러이다. 주가는 EMA21 204.41달러 아래에 있지만 EMA200 188.92달러 위에서 월간 확정 상승 추세를 보인다. 낙관적 의견은 AI 인프라 지배력과 장기 성장에 집중된다.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Trade below EMA21 $204.41 with 15.3 percent below 52-week high
symbol_briefs.key_risk_ko: EMA21 204.41달러 아래 거래 중 52주 고점 대비 15.3% 하회

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $563.29 with post-market at $562.89. Price sits below EMA21 at $576.62 in downtrend structure. Neutral sentiment reflects mixed views on YTD underperformance offset by valuation support.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META는 563.29달러에 마감했고 포스트마켓은 562.89달러이다. 주가는 EMA21 576.62달러 아래에서 하락 추세 구조에 있다. 중립 심리는 연초 대비 부진과 밸류에이션 지지 사이 혼재된 의견을 반영한다.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Continued trade below EMA21 $576.62 and EMA50 $596.40

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $420.60 with post-market at $418.25. Price trades below EMA21 at $401.29 yet above EMA200 at $396.71 after golden cross retest. Separately, optimistic discussion centers on Q2 delivery expectations and FSD regulatory progress in Europe.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSLA는 420.60달러에 마감했고 포스트마켓은 418.25달러이다. 주가는 EMA21 401.29달러 아래에 있지만 EMA200 396.71달러 위에서 골든크로스 재테스트 중이다. 한편 낙관적 논의는 2분기 인도 기대와 유럽 FSD 규제 진전에 집중된다.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Trade below EMA21 $401.29 with 15.7 percent below 52-week high
symbol_briefs.key_risk_ko: EMA21 401.29달러 아래 거래 중 52주 고점 대비 15.7% 하회

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $116.67 with post-market at $117.80. Price remains below EMA21 at $125.40 in distribution structure. Optimistic tone follows NATO Maven Smart System reaching full operational capability.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: 43.8 percent below 52-week high with trade below all EMAs

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,154.29 with post-market at $1,148.00. Price holds above EMA21 at $1,039.45 and EMA50 at $871.30 in confirmed uptrend with golden cross. Optimistic sentiment is fueled by strong AI-driven HBM and DRAM demand with raised outlook.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $763.14 with post-market at $761.28. Price trades above EMA21 at $685.38 and EMA50 at $621.80 in confirmed uptrend with golden cross near 52-week high. Optimistic focus centers on upcoming 4-for-1 stock split and cybersecurity momentum.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Breakout above $785.93 with support at EMA21 $685.38

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $238.34 with post-market at $238.65. Price sits below EMA21 at $242.52 yet above EMA200 at $234.21 with RSI bullish divergence. Optimistic views cite strong AWS AI demand growth and record Prime Day sales.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Trade below EMA21 $242.52 with 14.4 percent below 52-week high

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: 32.3 percent below 52-week high with trade below all EMAs

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $289.36 with post-market unchanged at $289.36. Price trades below EMA21 at $292.89 yet above EMA200 at $268.16 after golden cross retest. Fearful tone centers on Supreme Court App Store case risks to payment control.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $357.37 with post-market at $356.55. Price trades below EMA21 at $359.08 yet above EMA200 at $313.12 after golden cross retest with RSI bullish divergence. Optimistic reaction follows Morgan Stanley upgrade to $415 and new Gemini launches.
